parameters.bodyContent: =✅ Qualify demo requests with HubSpot and Outlook in real time — run completed at {{ $now.toFormat('HH:mm') }}

parameters.content:
### New Lead Form Submission

Serves an n8n-hosted form (Email, Company, Score). Each submission becomes one execution.

Next: Required Fields Present?

### Required Fields Present?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.email }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Remove Duplicate Leads · ②→ Abort — Malformed Input

### Abort — Malformed Input

Fails fast with a clear message; triggers the error workflow instead of processing bad data.

### Remove Duplicate Leads

Drops duplicates within this run (compared on `leadId`).

Next: Enrich — Primary Provider

### Enrich — Primary Provider

GET https://enrichment.example.com/v2/lookup — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Ports: ①→ Primary Hit? · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Primary Hit?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.company || $json.name }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Merge Enrichment Paths · ②→ Enrich — Fallback Provider

### Enrich — Fallback Provider

GET https://fallback-enrich.example.com/v1/person — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Ports: ①→ Merge Enrichment Paths · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Merge Enrichment Paths

Rejoins 2 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Score Enriched Records

### Score Enriched Records

Custom JavaScript: Score each lead 0-100 from simple heuristics

Next: Upsert into HubSpot

### Upsert into HubSpot

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Hot Lead? · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Hot Lead?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.score >= 80 }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: ①→ Ping Owner Immediately · ②→ Summarize Run Stats

### Ping Owner Immediately

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (HubSpot)

### Append Audit Row (HubSpot)

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Outlook · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Send Summary to Outlook

microsoftOutlook — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Microsoft OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

# Qualify demo requests with HubSpot and Outlook in real time

**Pattern:** Lead Capture & Routing · **Level:** Advanced · **Trigger:** Form

## What it does
Qualify demo requests with HubSpot and Outlook in real time. It starts from a hosted form submission.

## Why it exists
Manual routing is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
New Lead Form Submission → Required Fields Present? → Remove Duplicate Leads → Enrich — Primary Provider → Primary Hit? → Merge Enrichment Paths → Score Enriched Records → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to lead capture & routing without manual effort
- Anyone automating routing in sales
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Removes copy-paste errors
- Has retries and error handling built in
- Runs 24/7 in the background

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; HubSpot private-app token; Microsoft OAuth2; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## 🧹 Data quality

Dedupe/diff steps make re-runs safe: the same input twice will not create duplicate records. If you change the key fields, clear n8n's dedupe memory (node → 'Clear stored keys') before the next run.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your routing process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
